description: Imgix is a visual media platform for real-time image and video transformation, optimization, and delivery over a CDN. It also provides asset management and account/source management features for teams serving media from cloud or web origins.
summary: Imgix exposes three public developer HTTP surfaces: a URL-based Rendering API, a URL-based Video API, and a REST Management API; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or first-party CLI was found.
